title: Amos is Called
description: God calls Amos from shepherding in Tekoa to prophesy to Israel.

title: Travels to Bethel
description: Amos delivers warnings in the religious center of Israel.

title: Opposition from Amaziah
description: The priest Amaziah attempts to silence Amos.

title: Five Visions Given
description: Amos receives visions of judgment and restoration.

title: Promise of Restoration
description: God promises eventual restoration of Israel.
